title: MRD Resistance Geometry Pilot v0

coordinate_system.radius: Evidence-to-action distance from source-backed measurement or review-supported clinical context toward unresolved hypothesis.
coordinate_system.tension: Uncertainty preserved before downstream claim upgrade.

nodes.observation: Posttreatment patterns include MRD-negative clonal elimination and MRD-positive clonal stabilization or selection in one single-cell study.
nodes.tension: Single-study context; do not generalize frequency or patient-specific meaning.
nodes.public_use: Separate deep response from residual clone state in research maps.
nodes.do_not_infer: No patient-specific MRD interpretation, relapse prediction, or treatment guidance.

nodes.observation: Residual myeloma can involve transcriptional adaptation in addition to genetic evolution.
nodes.tension: Mechanistic implication requires source-specific extraction and expert review.
nodes.public_use: Preserve nongenetic state fields in extraction templates.

nodes.observation: Cycling-resistant plasma cells in the cited study showed a fatty-acid-oxidation shift.
nodes.tension: Metabolism bucket is hypothesis-generating for research extraction only.
nodes.public_use: Track metabolism as a research bucket.

nodes.observation: Selective plasma cells in the cited study favored NF-kB pathway activity.
nodes.tension: Pathway signal is not a clinical target-selection rule.
nodes.public_use: Track pathway-state hypotheses with source-specific limits.

nodes.observation: The cited single-cell study found correlation between genetic and transcriptional dynamics.
nodes.tension: Correlation does not by itself identify causal intervention points.
nodes.public_use: Avoid clone-only maps when representing resistance.
nodes.do_not_infer: No causal ranking or clinical decision support.

nodes.observation: Selective plasma cells had stronger tumor-microenvironment interactions in the cited study; reviews support microenvironment tracking as a major myeloma research dimension.
nodes.tension: Interaction fields need cell-pair and assay-context extraction before ranking.
nodes.public_use: Track interaction fields before ranking mechanisms.

nodes.observation: Reviews describe dynamic subclonal diversity and genomic instability across myeloma progression.
nodes.tension: Subclonal diversity is context, not a quantified risk score in this pilot.
nodes.public_use: Keep heterogeneity visible as a structural feature.

nodes.observation: Reviews emphasize clinical-translation barriers for single-cell technologies, including cost, data complexity, standardization, and ethical considerations.
nodes.tension: Technology promise and clinical readiness must remain separated.
nodes.public_use: Keep implementation readiness separate from biological plausibility.
nodes.do_not_infer: No claim that single-cell profiling is routine clinical decision support.

nodes.observation: Current reviews describe BCMA- and GPRC5D-directed immune therapies alongside continued relapse and sequencing questions.
nodes.tension: Therapy pressure is represented as research context, not treatment sequencing.
nodes.public_use: Represent therapy pressure without recommending sequencing.
nodes.do_not_infer: No product comparison, sequence, or trial recommendation.

nodes.observation: Reviews identify extramedullary disease and plasma cell leukemia as ongoing high-unmet-need contexts.
nodes.tension: High-unmet-need contexts require expert review and subtype-specific evidence.
nodes.public_use: Mark context modifiers requiring expert review.
nodes.do_not_infer: No patient-specific risk or treatment-fit inference.

next_work: Convert nodes into source-specific extraction records.
Add expert-review questions for each coordinate and tension field.
Compare the geometry map against a flat mechanism list.
Keep all patient-specific or case-specific reasoning out of the public stream.
